#SILVER The Silver TVC chart still has an unresolved bullish divergence on 1hourly chart, pointing toward the $63 zone, suggesting price may attempt to reach this level in the coming sessions!! A sustained move above $63 is crucial to confirm a shift in trend and strengthen the bullish outlook!! However, if price fails to hold above this level, the move could turn into nothing more than a relief rally, with another round of selling likely to emerge!!

It could deliver multiple times your investment and provide excellent returns in the future. The key is patience. #CNXMETAL Price is now approaching a major double support zone!!! A strong bounce from this area is important to keep the broader uptrend structure intact!!! As of now, the index has largely respected the expected path, with only minor changes in the lower-degree counts!! If this support zone holds, the probability increases for the next leg higher, potentially marking the start of the 5th wave up!!

Posted the #Gold and #Silver analysis in the morning when prices were near support and RSI was deeply oversold!! The bounce we are seeing was anticipated, though it may still turn out to be just an oversold bounce. A sustained move above the previous swing high would strengthen the case for a trend change!! Charts often provide valuable clues and can be right many times, but no setup is guaranteed!! The real edge comes from patience, discipline, proper risk management, and knowing when to enter

The entire financial analyst Buggy divided into two camps right now. One group expects a strong rally in Silver from these levels, while the other expects a deeper correction. I am the middleman 🥸 serving water to both the Camps !! You can never sell at the exact top, someone will always give you a higher target like ₹7 lakh Similarly, you can never buy at the exact bottom, because that's when pessimism is at its peak. My #investment rule is simple: Buy when fear dominates. Sell when every

You should not chase breakout in this Market, better sell at resistance and buy near support.. Change the gear from 4th to 2nd..rest control with clutch !! #DARVAS 🥸

#NIFTY Needs to sustain above the 24250–24300 zone to confirm a meaningful change in trend!! We are once again approaching a key resistance area. A decisive breakout and sustained move above this zone can open the door for higher targets!! Until then, expect some volatility and profit booking near resistance!!

#GENUSPOWER Yesterday was the breakout day, and today looks like a retest day. If this retest holds, the uptrend may continue from here!! Important Read: Now considering the pace of this fall and time taken by the entire upside correction, it's confirmed that the whole rise was c of (b).
